final:
module top_module(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input serial_in,
    output reg [3:0] parallel_out);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge reset or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (reset) begin
            parallel_out <= 4'b0000;
        end else begin
            parallel_out <= {parallel_out[2:0], serial_in};
        end
    end

endmodule
